decisions.lock: lane-ownership (acquire once per batch, serialize lands)
decisions.commit_policy: defer to campaign end (project rule: commit when asked); mirrors 7.1

completed_steps.title: Month 2 design doc
completed_steps.outcome: PM-invariant audit: PM tolerates N concurrent integrating per lane with ZERO PM code changes. Re-admission = resetToQueued+re-pickup. Cross-worktree SHA materialization (fetch predecessor tree from predecessor worktree path) flagged for Step 5. events.ts wire-frame must be extended to pass batchId/speculativePosition (Step 7).

completed_steps.title: parallelism setting
completed_steps.deliverable: parallelism:int>=1 default 1 across shared/project.ts (canonical), routes/projects.ts (Zod-4 mirror, the 400 gate), integrator-ref config.ts + pm-client.ts
completed_steps.outcome: Threaded through all config surfaces; default 1 = exact 7.1 behavior.

completed_steps.title: Worktree pool
completed_steps.outcome: createWorktreePool composes N createWorktree clones at ${root}/${name}-{0..N-1}; synchronous atomic acquire (null=backpressure), release, ensureAll, repair(slot), gc (numeric-suffix guard).

completed_steps.title: Batch scheduler (core)
completed_steps.deliverable: NEW packages/integrator-ref/src/batch.ts + tests/batch.test.ts (5 tests). index.ts/loop.ts untouched.
completed_steps.outcome: Single-member-at-a-time scheduler (re-cut after Step-4 verifier proved concurrent-before-speculation forces drift-churn). Delivers full skeleton: Batch/Member model (§3.1 enum), lane-lock-ONCE lifecycle (acquire outside try, single .unref() heartbeat, release in finally), pool acquire-before-pickup backpressure, structural ordered tryLand (§6.1), parallelism:1==runOnce sequence parity (verifier confirmed byte-identical: 7.1 runOnce already acquires lock before pickup). Two seams for Steps 5/6: computeSpeculativeBase (live-main, no chain) + onMemberFailed (single-member reject/drift, suffix-invalidation no-op). Pins applied: completeAttempt(attemptId) not requestId; test-3 race via one-shot author-push wrapper on gitOps push. Friction fixed: position derived from landed-count (not monotonic), invalidated members excluded from active/land sets. 60 passed/1 skipped, typecheck+build+lint exit 0.

completed_steps.title: Speculative rebase + concurrent verify
completed_steps.deliverable: git-ops.ts fetchFromPath primitive + test; batch.ts speculative chain + concurrent drain restructure; 6 new batch tests.
completed_steps.outcome: ABSORBED concurrency (deferred from re-cut Step 4) + speculation together. fetchFromPath(path,sha)=git.raw(fetch path sha) = §4.3 cross-worktree COMMIT materialization (verifier confirmed rebaseOnto returns commit sha via revparse HEAD; local-transport bare-SHA fetch reliable). computeSpeculativeBase chains K onto surviving-predecessor's rebasedTreeSha; landed predecessor anchors to live main. Drain restructured serial->rebase-sequential/verify-parallel: Member.verify promise tracked in inFlight set, Promise.race + tryLand per settle, single lane lock unchanged. MANDATORY FIX (verifier REVISE): speculativePosition now strictly-monotonic admission counter (never reused); chaining+land predecessor derived from SURVIVING prefix filter (not position-1 over unfiltered array incl. failed members) - prevents wrong-predecessor lookup. Constraints honored: win32 verify cmd 'ping -n 2 127.0.0.1 > nul'; overlap asserted pairwise (latest-start<earliest-end); completeAttempt:passed stays in landMember. Friction: drain termination forward-progress guard; invalidated re-admission via WeakSet. 66 passed/1 skipped, typecheck(6/6)+build+lint clean. plan APPROVE-with-folded-fix (no separate re-verify - adversary specified the fix).

completed_steps.title: Land serialization + suffix invalidation
completed_steps.deliverable: git-ops.ts runVerify AbortSignal seam + 2 tests; batch.ts VerifyHandle + computeSuffix + invalidateSuffix + onBatchEvent hook call sites; 5 batch tests (mid/tail/head/base-proof/kill-during-verify).
completed_steps.outcome: HEART OF PHASE. Structural suffix = members whose predecessorChain contains failed K (NOT positional). Cascade in onMemberFailed after real-failure rejects (conflict/verify/push_other, NOT drift). VerifyHandle={done,kill}; kill()=controller.abort()->git-ops runVerify AbortSignal->EXISTING killTree (no 2nd kill path). Re-admit recomputes corrected base via surviving-prefix (main+0 not main+0+1) - automatic. TWO MANDATORY verifier fixes (cascade race REAL): (1) synchronous first-pass marks ALL suffix invalidated+kill+release BEFORE any await; (2) post-await bail-guard in runVerifyTask (state!==verifying->return) - the guard plan assumed but code lacked. Executor found+fixed THIRD window: empty-predecessorChain admit window (push to members only AFTER computeSpeculativeBase sets chain) + mid-admit invalidation guards after startAttempt/rebaseOnto. Tests de-fragilized vs shared-repo pollution (prove cascade via resetToQueued/re-pickup seq + initial-vs-readmit base equality); failing member uses DELAYED verify fail so dependents speculate before it fails. kill-during-verify proves NO double-handling (exactly one resetToQueued+one reject). onBatchEvent = Step-7 seam only (NO endpoint/EVENT_NAMES/batchId tagging). 72 passed/1 skipped stable x2, typecheck(6/6)+build+lint clean.

completed_steps.title: Batch observability events
completed_steps.deliverable: event-bus.ts +4 MERGE_BATCH_* names; NEW routes/merge-batches.ts relay endpoint; app.ts mount; events.ts wire-frame pass-through; merge-requests.ts optional pickup/startAttempt tags + service threading; listeners.ts eventToAction; pm-client.ts postBatchEvent+tags; 4 new test files/extensions; openapi regen.
completed_steps.outcome: PM relays integrator batch markers as SSE - NO merge_batch table, NO @pm/shared change (decision 1). Relay POST /projects/{id}/merge-batches/events: LOCAL Zod-4 discriminated union (NOT @pm/shared Zod-3), ai_agent-only inline gate (user.type!==ai_agent->403 FORBIDDEN), emits merge.batch.* with entityType=merge_batch entityId=batchId, persists nothing, 202. onAll auto-forwards (iterates EVENT_NAMES). Verifier traced ALL 3 event subscribers: SSE projection does NO entity DB lookup (only actor); activity_log INSERT is FK-SAFE (entityType/entityId have no FK; projectId+actorId real); automation listener no-op. Synthetic events safe end-to-end. events.ts pass-through reads batchId/speculativePosition off payload.entity (omitted when absent=byte-identical 7.1 frames). Optional pickup/startAttempt batch tags thread via emit/emitAttempt extra spread onto payload.entity. Polish folded: eventToAction maps 4 names. index.ts UNTOUCHED (onBatchEvent->postBatchEvent wiring = Step 9). 789 server passed + 84 integrator/1 skip, typecheck 6/6, openapi exported, lint clean in touched files (59 server errors pre-existing baseline).

completed_steps.title: Verify retry policy
completed_steps.deliverable: git-ops.ts spawnError field; categorize.ts classifyVerifyFailure; batch.ts Member.retryCount + retry loop + abortable sleep; git-ops + batch tests (6).
completed_steps.outcome: Transient (spawnError=child-never-ran / external signal-kill) -> retry same base in-place, capped, exponential backoff; REAL (exitCode!=0 OR timedOut=our-verify-timeout) -> reject+suffix-invalidate. classifyVerifyFailure ordering: timedOut->real FIRST (timed-out verify also has signal+null-exit; must be real not transient), then spawnError->transient, then null-exit+signal->transient, then exitCode!=0->real. Retry loop sits AFTER Step-6 bail-guard, INSIDE runVerifyTask (handle/controller stable across iterations). FOUR verifier fixes: (A) superseded attempt completeAttempt(FAILED) not cancelled (complete endpoint enum=[passed,failed]); (B) baseShaOf(member.base) not placeholder recordedBaseSha; (C) post-sleep state!==verifying re-check BEFORE startAttempt + same {batchId,speculativePosition} tags; (D) backoff schedule corrected post-exec to LITERAL [1000,5000,15000]=1s/5s/15s per design §10.2 (was wrongly 1s/2s/4s exponential; verifier flagged §10 mismatch; design doc is authoritative); retryBackoffMs?:number[] override (tests use [5,5,5]/[200,200,200]); cap 3. Same controller.signal threaded into runVerify AND sleep -> suffix-kill during backoff aborts sleep, post-sleep guard returns before startAttempt (test 5 proves no illegal retry). index.ts/loop.ts untouched. NOTE: plan+verify+execute were dispatched concurrently here (sequencing slip) - verifier's backoff REVISE landed after exec, fixed in a follow-up pass. 89 passed/1 skip, typecheck(6/6)+build+lint clean.

_step9.title: Lane-ownership lock migration
_step9.deliverable: index.ts rewired runLoop->runBatchLoop (pool + gitOps factory + RunBatchLoopDeps + onBatchEvent->postBatchEvent); batch.ts tag pickup/startAttempt (admit+retry); 3 new tests; integration.test.ts invariant comment.
_step9.outcome: LIVE wire-up. index.ts: createWorktreePool(parallelism), pool.gc()+ensureAll() startup, gitOps factory (p)=>createGitOps(simpleGit(p)), RunBatchLoopDeps with defaultVerifyCommand/verifyTimeoutSec (NOT verifyCommand/verifyTimeoutMs - exec corrected spec field names to source), maxVerifyRetries/retryBackoffMs OMITTED->batch defaults. onBatchEvent synchronous void + .catch (telemetry POST failure cannot crash loop). reclaimStrandedRequests UNCHANGED (already N-tolerant loop, 4 args, no worktree dep - design §12 finding 1). loop.ts/loop.test.ts KEPT (batch.ts imports isApiError/errMessage from loop.js; superseded-but-retained, flag for Step 11). Verifier confirmed 7.1 spawned E2E survives all 4 flows at parallelism:1 (esp. Flow-4 cancel-via-lock-starvation: acquire-before-pickup preserved, attempts.length===0 holds). batch.test.ts asserts call NAMES not args so tags non-breaking. 3 new tests: crash-recovery reclaims N=3; second-integrator->lock_unavailable+zero push; tag-wiring. 92 passed/1 skip, build+typecheck(6/6)+lint clean. SEQUENTIAL plan->verify->execute (no concurrency slip).

_step10.title: Full-stack E2E for batching
_step10.deliverable: NEW tests/batch-e2e.test.ts (6 tests, 4 flows). NO src changes.
_step10.outcome: Regression net. Spawns REAL integrator (node dist/index.js) at parallelism:3 (set via project.settings.integrator.parallelism - NO env var) against in-process PM + real bare git remote, mirroring 7.1 integration.test.ts harness. Flow a: 3 disjoint clean branches, per-request marker-writing verifyCmd, asserts >=1 pair of [start.mtime,end.mtime] intervals INTERSECT (real overlap, not wall-clock ratio) + ordered land + main+3. Flow b: req1 DELAY_FAIL middle -> req0 lands, req1 rejected+merge_rejection comment, req2 re-verifies vs corrected base + lands; asserts main has clean.txt+clean3.txt NOT clean2.txt (the '0+2 not 1' suffix proof, no leak path) + FOLD1 req2 attempts[0].baseSha===req0.landedSha AND attempts.length>=2. Flow c: 5 branches/3 slots, poll listIntegrating, peak<=3 HARD (structural-pool.acquire caps) + FOLD2 peak>=2 SOFT. Flow d: parallelism:1 == 7.1 serial oracle (land/reject/FIFO + attempts.length===1 single-attempt). Per-describe isolation (closeDb global), Set<ChildProcess> exit-guard, gate hasGit&&distExists default-on. Verifier cleared all 6 risks: ready-before-clones SAFE (ensureAll awaited before loop admits). FULL MONOREPO GREEN: 1246 passed/1 skip (258 shared+101 mcp+789 server+98 integrator), typecheck 6/6.

_step11.title: Documentation
_step11.deliverable: docs/integrator-deployment.md (parallelism + pool layout + lane lock + batch events + failure modes + game_one N-slot layout); docs/design/phase-7.2-design.md §16 deviations + Shipped status; CLAUDE.md merge-train 7.2 note; integrator-ref README.md parallelism + runBatchLoop-is-live.
_step11.outcome: Docs-only, cross-checked against shipped source: parallelism (int>=1 default 1, project.settings.integrator NOT env), worktree pool ${worktree_name}-{0..N-1}, endpoint POST /projects/{id}/merge-batches/events ai_agent-only, 4 merge.batch.* event names, batch_id/speculative_position tags - all verified. §16 documents deviations (Step4->5 concurrency boundary move, VerifyHandle AbortSignal kill, monotonic position+surviving-prefix, 3 cascade-race guards, completeAttempt(failed) superseded retry, spawnError=exitCode127, no merge_batch table). No code contradictions found. typecheck 6/6, server 789 passed.

final_gate.tests: 1246 passed / 1 skipped (258 shared + 101 mcp + 789 server + 98 integrator-ref/1 skip)
final_gate.lint: integrator-ref clean; ~59 server errors are pre-existing baseline in untouched files (NOT campaign regressions)
final_gate.commit_note: Left dirty for human review per project CLAUDE.md 'commit only when asked' (overrides campaign default). Tree also holds the earlier uncommitted Stage 1 + task-claims + awareness + Phase 7.1 work.

open_issues: Forward dep: 7.4 dashboard consumes batch events/integrator, not PM tables.
Cross-worktree SHA materialization is the riskiest mechanism (Step 5 implements+tests under overlapping verifies).

STEP 4/5 BOUNDARY RE-CUT (commander decision, 2026-05-29): Step 4 verifier proved that sound concurrent lands CANNOT precede speculation — serialized-land + independent-on-main bases mathematically force a non-fast-forward (drift+requeue+re-verify) on every member after position 0, which is strictly worse than serial and contradicts design happy path §4.5. Step 4 is therefore re-cut as a SINGLE-MEMBER-AT-A-TIME scheduler delivering the full skeleton (Batch/Member model, lane-lock-once lifecycle, pool acquire/release, structural land-gate §6.1, backpressure admission gating, parallelism:1==runOnce regression guard). TRUE N-concurrency is introduced in Step 5 together with speculation (chained bases + cross-worktree SHA fetch + overlapping verifies) — the only point where N-in-flight produces clean fast-forward lands. Campaign end-state unchanged; only the concurrency-introduction boundary moved 4->5. computeSpeculativeBase + onMemberFailed remain the two Step-4 seams Steps 5/6 plug into.
